name: Treacle Scones (Scottish)
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Black Treacle or Golden Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (Mark 7).
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Sift the flour and salt into a bowl. Rub in the butter until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
4. Add the sugar and cinnamon, mixing well.
5. Gradually add the treacle or syrup and enough milk to form a soft dough.
6. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead gently. The dough should be moist and elastic.
7. Roll out to about 1/2 inch thick. Cut into rounds using a 2-1/2 inch pastry cutter.
8. Place the scones on the prepared baking sheet, brush with a little milk, and bake for 10-15 minutes until golden brown.
9. Cool on a wire rack. Serve split in half and buttered.
